name: farmacia-santacasa-v2
description: Aplicação fullstack para gestão operacional entre Santa Casa e Farmácia.

scripts.dev: concurrently --kill-others-on-fail -n BACKEND,FRONTEND -c blue,green "npm run dev:backend" "npm run dev:frontend"
scripts.install:all: npm run install:backend && npm run install:frontend
scripts.audit: npm run audit:backend && npm run audit:frontend
scripts.validate:backend: npm run test:backend:unit && npm run test:backend:integration && npm run test:backend:e2e && npm run audit:backend
scripts.validate:frontend: npm run lint:frontend && npm run build:frontend && npm run audit:frontend
scripts.validate: npm run validate:backend && npm run validate:frontend
